title: Form the Input Vector
text: Since the model includes an intercept, the input vector should start with a $$1$$. Then place the opponent fans in $$x_1$$ and One-Hot-Wonder fans as $$x_2$$.

title: Compute the Linear Score
text: Compute the linear score by multiplying the parameter vector by the feature vector for the new game:\n$$z=\hat{\theta}**{T}\begin{pmatrix}1\\\text{opponent $$fans}\\\text{One-Hot$$ $$Wonders$$ $$fans}\end{pmatrix}$$

title: Converting to Probability $$p$$
text: Now that you have the linear score, use the logistic regression prediction rule to convert that value into probability $$p$$.
